headings.usage: Use Outfit for all headings. Tight tracking (tracking-tight) for H1 and H2. H1 max text-5xl sm:text-6xl.

body.usage: Use Manrope for body text. leading-relaxed for paragraphs.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Asymmetric grids for projects. The 'Bento' Grid Protocol for skills and about section.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-8, p-12, p-20, p-32. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-8 or p-12).
layout_and_spacing.hero_section: Full screen (min-h-screen). Absolute positioned 3D canvas or background image behind content. Content aligned left or center-left, optical alignment. Max overlay bg-black/40 if using image fallback.
layout_and_spacing.projects_grid: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Mix column spans (col-span-full, col-span-4) with gap-8 or gap-12. Do not just use a standard 3-column equal grid.

components.navigation: Sticky Header with Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10). Explicit navigation links on desktop, no hamburger menu on desktop. Contains Logo, Links, CTA.
components.buttons: Flat rectangular or slightly rounded (rounded-md). bg-white text-black for primary CTA. Hover: scale slightly, bg-zinc-200. Secondary: border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/5.
components.cards: Cardless or Glassmorphic surfaces. Never use pure #000000 cards. Use subtle 1px border-white/10 to ground elements.
components.forms: Shadcn UI completely restyled. bg-white/5 borders, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent-primary.
components.3d_elements: Use React Three Fiber (R3F) + Drei for abstract floating geometries (spheres, cubes, toruses, servers) with glass material in the Hero section. Use fallback hero image if R3F fails.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling using Framer Motion or standard CSS smooth scroll. Staggered fade-up entrances for list items and grids.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle translate-y (-translate-y-1) and box-shadow glows on cards. Buttons must change text color if background changes.

hero_fallback_bg.description: Abstract 3D geometric shapes with subtle blue glow. Use as background in Hero section if R3F is not implemented or as a fallback.

projects.title: Fintech Dashboard UI
projects.description: Dark mode modern web application dashboard. Use in the Projects showcase.

projects.title: Data Network Visualizer
projects.description: Abstract 3D data network nodes. Use in the Projects showcase.

projects.title: Mobile Banking App
projects.description: Clean minimal mobile app screens in a dark void. Use in the Projects showcase.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the dark theme palette. Do not use pure white backgrounds anywhere except for high-contrast primary buttons.
Implement React Three Fiber (R3F) + Drei in the Hero section for 3D tech-related models (e.g., floating network nodes, servers, or abstract geometric glass primitives).
Use framer-motion for smooth staggered reveal animations on scroll.
For the Projects section, use an asymmetrical Grid (Tetris Grid) with varying col-spans. Do NOT use a boring 3-column equal grid.
For the Google and Microsoft experience logos, use react-icons (e.g., FaGoogle, FaMicrosoft) or lucide-react instead of raster images to maintain the clean dark mode aesthetic.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements.
Prioritize optical alignment over strict geometric alignment for all text blocks.
